properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just like an eagle, We fly above the sky and clearly see things that are to be No Matter what tide may come No matter what happens to this word our wings will lift us high

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lift us High, above the heavens Leaving all this world behind Let us fly, So High We will meet the Lord in the sky

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be like an eagle living in peace and trust those wings can lead him to all things He may be hurt and locked in a cage He'll find a way out till his sage And cry out I can fly

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can fly beyond the heaven Leaving all this world behind Let us fly, So high We will meet the Lord in the sky

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: At times you are tested hurt and tried and all you feel is just to slide yet He is there to guide You might have suffering and cried From all your problems you can't hide spread your wings and fly
